name: [GRIDHAND] Seasonal Campaign Agent - Black Friday: 2 weeks before → tease → launch → follow-up se

gridhand.scenario: Black Friday: 2 weeks before → tease → launch → follow-up sequence
gridhand.description: Two weeks before Black Friday, a timed automation workflow is triggered in GRIDHAND, which begins by sending a teaser email to subscribers through Mailchimp, hinting at upcoming exclusive deals and discounts at the local retail store. As the launch date approaches, the workflow automatically switches to a launch sequence, publishing promotional posts on the store's Facebook and Instagram accounts, and sending a follow-up email with detailed offers and limited-time coupons to incentivize sales, ultimately driving foot traffic and revenue for the business owner during the critical holiday shopping period. By streamlining this promotional sequence, the business owner can focus on in-store preparations while GRIDHAND handles the marketing outreach, ensuring a successful and profitable Black Friday event.
